reviews.comment:
Aguante ipf

(Translated by Google)
IPF endurance
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBb19uSEVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo el parque linda vista al campo. Compre café y facturas todo muy rico y sobre el café caliente. Los baños muy limpios.

(Translated by Google)
The park is lovely, with a beautiful view of the countryside. I bought coffee and pastries; everything was delicious, and the coffee was hot. The restrooms were very clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBaWJISENnEAE

reviews.comment:
Era muy buena parada, pero la cocina cambió, empezó a haber olor feo en el bar, ya casi no paramos

(Translated by Google)
It used to be a great stop, but the food changed, there started to be a bad smell in the bar, we hardly ever stopped there anymore
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1X0tuNEtnEAE

reviews.comment:
Todo bien! Para descansar, tomar algo e ir al baño.

(Translated by Google)
Everything's fine! Time to rest, have a drink, and go to the bathroom.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBbXJLVDhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Café de mala calidad. No tenían opciones sin TACC (ninguna). Pedí libro de reclamos y sugerencias y no estaba disponible

(Translated by Google)
Poor quality coffee. They had no gluten-free options (none). I asked for a complaints and suggestions book and it wasn't available.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBd28yTFdREAE

reviews.comment:
Muy bien. Como prácticamente todas las estaciones de ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Very good. Like practically all ACA stations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfa2ZHakpREAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención tanto de los playeros, como de las chicas del YPF full !!! Riquísimas y variadas las comidas y  postres!!!Además tienen todos los precios a la vista!!! No como en la mayoría de las otras YPF!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from both the attendants and the staff at the YPF Full station! The food and desserts are delicious and varied! Plus, all the prices are clearly displayed! Unlike most other YPF stations!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfdWRxMF9nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Nuestra parada obligada desde hace muchos años entre Capital y Venado Tuerto. desde que nisiquiera estaba la autopista Bs.As./pergamino.
Siempre atienden bien
Han desmejorado mucho la higiene y cuidado de los baños desde que no está mas la Sra. Que cuidaba.

(Translated by Google)
Our go-to stop for many years between Buenos Aires and Venado Tuerto, even before the Buenos Aires/Pergamino highway was built.
They always provide good service. However, the hygiene and upkeep of the restrooms have deteriorated significantly since the lady who used to look after them left.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJM05IdEp3EAE

reviews.comment:
Desastroso. Caminaban las cucarachas por el exhibidor de la comida. 9500 una hamburguesa completa sin papas y los que atienden son poco amables.

(Translated by Google)
Disastrous. Cockroaches were crawling all over the food display. 9500 for a full hamburger without fries, and the staff were unfriendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfcGZ2cVp3EAE

reviews.comment:
Los baños estaban muy limpios ,,el Shop está bien no es Full no tiene promo ,muy buena la atención de las empleadas

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were very clean, the shop is fine, it's not a full-service store and doesn't have any promotions, but the staff were very attentive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURmMzZtdXlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Estuve allí el sabado 4/01/2025 alrededor del 13:30 hs para cargar combustible con unos cheques del ACA el playero nos dijo que no podíamos cargar con esos cheques y pagar con la app de YPF. Nunca nos pasó solo es este ACA. Muy mala atención del playero.

(Translated by Google)
I was there on Saturday, January 4, 2025, around 1:30 PM to fill up with fuel using ACA checks. The attendant told us we couldn't use those checks and had to pay with the YPF app. This has never happened to us before, only at this ACA. The attendant's service was very poor.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURmelpqMXhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Tienen algo de oferta para comer para zafar a un precio razonable. La limpieza no prima, quien te cobra te arma el pedido en la cocina. Los baños estaban desastrosos.

(Translated by Google)
They have some affordable food options. Cleanliness isn't a priority; the person who takes your order puts it together in the kitchen. The bathrooms were a disaster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURmMnMzV3dRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena opción para hacer una pausa al manejo. Baños limpios, mesas y sillas a la sombra, y agua para el mate gratis. Recomendable!

(Translated by Google)
A great option for a break from driving. Clean restrooms, tables and chairs in the shade, and free hot water for mate. Highly recommended!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURmX0pMTXRBRRAB

reviews.comment:
se vino medio abajo con el tiempo, el café ya no es tan bueno, y la atención definitivamente no es tan buena, una pena...

(Translated by Google)
It's kind of gone downhill over time, the coffee isn't as good anymore, and the service definitely isn't as good, a shame...
